$comment: AFL league calendar events. Mirrors TheLeague's shape (see src/data/theleague/league-events.ts and src/types/league-events.ts). Custom computed rules used here: 'saturday-before-labor-day-weekend' (AL Live Draft — the Saturday a week before Labor Day, NOT on the holiday weekend), 'sunday-before-labor-day-weekend' (NL Email Draft, 9am PT — the next day). Keeper deadline is fixed July 15.

events.name: New Season Starts
events.description: AFL league year rolls over and rosters lock for the new season.

events.name: Keeper Deadline
events.description: Final day to declare your 7 keepers. Anyone not protected enters the draft pool.

events.name: American League Draft
events.description: AL teams meet live for the conference draft — veterans and rookies on the same board.

events.name: National League Draft
events.description: NL teams begin the email draft at 9am PT Sunday. Slow draft, but the clock matters.

events.name: NFL Season Starts
events.description: NFL kickoff and the start of weekly fantasy matchups across both conferences.

events.name: Trade Deadline
events.description: Final day to submit trades. Deadline is the Wednesday between Week 10 and Week 11.

events.name: Regular Season Ends
events.description: Week 13 closes the regular season. Premier/D-League cutoff and conference seeds lock.

events.name: Conference Playoffs
events.description: Week 14 — conference seeds 1-4 begin head-to-head playoffs.

events.name: World Championship
events.description: Week 16 — AL champion vs. NL champion in the World Championship.
